'''Hume''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Biography==
During the Clone Wars, Hume was an officer<ref name="LOTJR" /> and pilot<ref name="LOTJDON">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]''</ref> in the Galactic Republic.<ref name="LOTJR" /> 

After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was formed by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Hume was among the others that stood against the Empire and erased all records of himself when he joined the [[Erased]]. He travelled with [[Ferus Olin]], [[Trever Flume]] and other members of the Erased to the place of [[Solace (location)|Solace]] for protection in anticipation of an attack against the Erased from the Empire. They eventually reached the place and learned that [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace]] was not a place, but a person.<ref name="LOTJR" /> During a subsequent attack, Hume died trying to save a group of people that were surrounded by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] that were attacking the place of Solace.<ref name="LOTJDON" />

== Behind the scenes ==
Hume first appeared in the ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld|Last of the Jedi: Underworld.]]''<ref name="LOTJR" /> There is a discrepancy between Underworld and the [[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo|''Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo'']]. In Underworld Hume is described as being a officer in the Republic Army who was not a clone by [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]],<ref name="LOTJR" /> while in Death on Naboo, Hume is described as having been a pilot in the Republic Army.<ref name="LOTJDON" /> This article presumes both to be true.
